---
title: "06: Stromal Subset CLR Cell Frequency Analysis"
output:
  github_document:
    html_preview: false
---

## R Libraries

```{r libraries, results=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(compositions)
library(purrr)
library(forcats)
library(writexl)
library(readxl)
library(svglite)
library(tidyr)
```
---

## Per-Sample Proportions

```{r cell_proportions, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
stromal_subset <- readRDS("RDS/stromal_subset_umap_8_clusters.RDS")

meta <- stromal_subset@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::filter(condition %in% c("NV", "CAR-T Control", "CAR-T Enterocolitis")) %>%
  mutate(condition = fct_relevel(condition, "CAR-T Enterocolitis", "CAR-T Control", "NV")) %>%
  as.data.frame()

per_sample_counts <- meta %>%
  dplyr::count(sample_names, seurat_clusters) %>%
  group_by(sample_names) %>%
  mutate(
    total_cells_sample = sum(n),
    pct_within_sample  = n / total_cells_sample * 100
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(meta %>% dplyr::select(sample_names, condition) %>% distinct(),
            by = "sample_names")

head(per_sample_counts)
```

---

## CLR Transformation

```{r clr_transform, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
clr_df <- per_sample_counts %>%
  dplyr::select(sample_names, condition, seurat_clusters, pct_within_sample) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = seurat_clusters, values_from = pct_within_sample, values_fill = 0)

clr_mat <- clr(as.matrix(clr_df %>% dplyr::select(-sample_names, -condition)))

clr_long <- as.data.frame(clr_mat) %>%
  mutate(sample_names = clr_df$sample_names, condition = clr_df$condition) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(sample_names, condition), names_to = "cluster", values_to = "clr_value")
```

---

## Linear Model + emmeans

```{r lm_emmeans, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
diff_df <- clr_long %>%
  split(.$cluster) %>%
  map_dfr(~ {
    f  <- lm(clr_value ~ condition, data = .x)
    em <- emmeans(f, pairwise ~ condition, ref = "NV", adjust = "none", infer = TRUE)
    as.data.frame(em[[2]]) %>% mutate(cluster = unique(.x$cluster))
  }) %>%
  filter(grepl("NV", contrast)) %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  mutate(p.adjust = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    signif = case_when(
      p.adjust < 0.001 ~ "***", p.adjust < 0.01 ~ "**", p.adjust < 0.05 ~ "*", TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    est_label = sprintf("%+.2f%s", estimate, signif),
    condition = gsub(" - NV", "", contrast)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(cluster)) %>%
  mutate(cluster = factor(cluster, levels = unique(cluster)))

write_xlsx(diff_df, "csvs/stroma_clusterwise_CLR_cond_vs_NV.xlsx")
```

---

## Forest Plot

```{r forest_plot, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
diff_df <- read_excel("csvs/stroma_clusterwise_CLR_cond_vs_NV.xlsx")
diff_df$cluster <- factor(diff_df$cluster, levels = unique(diff_df$cluster))

p <- ggplot(diff_df, aes(x = estimate, y = cluster, color = condition)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = lower.CL, xmax = upper.CL),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.55), height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.55), size = 2) +
  geom_text(aes(x = upper.CL + 0.25, label = est_label, group = condition),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.55),
            vjust = 0.3, size = 1.8, color = "black", show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "(CAR-T Control)"       = "#F5C342",
    "(CAR-T Enterocolitis)" = "#D4494E"
  )) +
  labs(x = "CLR difference vs NV", y = "Stromal cluster", color = "Condition",
       title = "Stromal Subset: CLR-normalised Frequency Differences vs NV") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-100, 100, by = 1)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text     = element_text(size = 6, color = "black"),
    axis.title    = element_text(size = 7, color = "black"),
    panel.grid    = element_blank(),
    axis.line     = element_line(color = "black"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

print(p)
```

```{r save_forest, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ggsave("figs/stroma_cell_freq_forest_plot.svg",
       plot = p, 
       device = svglite, 
       width = 600, 
       height = 800,
       units = "px")
```
